Module 0: Getting Started 0.07 | Financial Statement Analysis Overview

Financial statement analysis involves interpreting and evaluating a company’s performance and position to make investment decisions. Topics include financial reporting standards, analysis and interpretation of key financial statements including the income statement, balance sheet and cash flow statement, financial reporting quality, and financial analysis techniques and modeling.

Learning Modules and Lessons

Introduction to Financial Statement Analysis

Lesson 1: Financial Statement Analysis Framework

Lesson 2: Scope of Financial Statement Analysis

Lesson 3: Regulated Sources of Information

Lesson 4: Comparison of IFRS with Alternative Financial Reporting Systems

Lesson 5: Other Sources of Information

Analyzing Income Statements

Lesson 1: Revenue Recognition

Lesson 2: Expense Recognition

Lesson 3: Non-Recurring Items

Lesson 4: Earnings per Share

Lesson 5: Income Statement Ratios and Common-Size Analysis

Analyzing Balance Sheets

Lesson 1: Intangible Assets

Lesson 2: Goodwill

Lesson 3: Financial Instruments

Lesson 4: Non-Current Liabilities

Lesson 5: Ratios and Common-Size Analysis

Analyzing Statements of Cash Flows I

Lesson 1: Linkages between the Financial Statements

Lesson 2: The Direct Method for Cash Flows from Operating Activities

Lesson 3: The Indirect Method for Cash Flows from Operating Activities

Lesson 4: Conversion from the Indirect to Direct Method

Lesson 5: Cash Flows from Investing Activities

Lesson 6: Cash Flows from Financing Activities

Lesson 7: Differences in Cash Flow Statements Prepared under US GAAP versus IFRS

Analyzing Statements of Cash Flows II

Lesson 1: Evaluating Sources and Uses of Cash

Lesson 2: Ratios and Common-Size Analysis

Lesson 3: Free Cash Flow Measures

Lesson 4: Cash Flow Statement Analysis: Cash Flow Ratios

Analysis of Inventories

Lesson 1: Inventory Valuation

Lesson 2: The Effects of Inflation and Deflation on Inventories, Costs of Sales, and Gross Margin

レッスン(Lesson)3: 表示と開示(Presentation and Disclosure)

Analysis of Long-Term Assets

Lesson 1: Acquisition of Intangible Assets

レッスン(Lesson)2: 資産の減損(Impairment)と帳簿除去(Derecognition of Assets)

レッスン(Lesson)3: 表示と開示(Presentation and Disclosure)

レッスン(Lesson)4: 分析における開示の活用(Using Disclosures in Analysis)

長期負債(Long-Term Liabilities)および株主資本(Equity)のトピック

レッスン(Lesson)1: リース(Leases)

レッスン(Lesson)2: 退職後給付(Postemployment)および株式報酬(Share-Based Compensation)プランの財務報告(Financial Reporting)

Lesson 3: Presentation and Disclosure

法人所得税(Income Taxes)の分析

レッスン(Lesson)1: 会計上の利益(Accounting Profit)と課税所得(Taxable Income)の違い

レッスン(Lesson)2: 繰延税金資産・負債(Deferred Tax Assets and Liabilities)

レッスン(Lesson)3: 法人所得税率(Corporate Income Tax Rates)

レッスン(Lesson)4: 表示と開示(Presentation and Disclosure)

財務報告の質(Financial Reporting Quality)

レッスン(Lesson)1: 概念的概要(Conceptual Overview)

レッスン(Lesson)2: GAAPと意思決定に有用な財務報告(GAAP, Decision Useful Financial Reporting)

レッスン(Lesson)3: 偏った会計選択(Biased Accounting Choices)

レッスン(Lesson)4: GAAPからの逸脱(Departures from GAAP)

レッスン(Lesson)5: 保守的会計と積極的会計の区別(Differentiate between Conservative and Aggressive Accounting)

レッスン(Lesson)6: 財務報告の質を評価するための文脈(Context for Assessing Financial Reporting Quality)

レッスン(Lesson)7: 財務報告の質を規律する仕組み(Mechanisms That Discipline Financial Reporting Quality)

レッスン(Lesson)8: 財務報告の質に関する問題の検出: 入門と表示選択(Detection of Financial Reporting Quality Issues: Introduction and Presentation Choices)

レッスン(Lesson)9: 会計上の選択(Accounting Choices)と見積り(Estimates)

レッスン(Lesson)10: キャッシュフロー計算書(Cash Flow Statement)に影響する会計上の選択(Accounting Choices That Affect the Cash Flow Statement)

レッスン(Lesson)11: 財務報告(Financial Reporting)に影響する会計上の選択(Accounting Choices that Affect Financial Reporting)

レッスン(Lesson)12: 警告サイン(Warning Signs)

財務分析手法(Financial Analysis Techniques)

レッスン(Lesson)1: 財務分析プロセス(The Financial Analysis Process)

レッスン(Lesson)2: 分析ツールと手法(Analytical Tools and Techniques)

レッスン(Lesson)3: 財務比率分析(Financial Ratio Analysis)

レッスン(Lesson)4: 共通サイズ貸借対照表(Common Size Balance Sheets)と損益計算書(Common Size Income Statements)

レッスン(Lesson)5: 財務諸表における横断分析(Cross-Sectional)、傾向分析(Trend Analysis)、および関係性(Relationships)

レッスン(Lesson)6: グラフ(Graphs)と回帰分析(Regression Analysis)の活用

レッスン(Lesson)7: 共通比率カテゴリ(Common Ratio Categories)、解釈(Interpretation)、および文脈(Context)

レッスン(Lesson)8: 活動比率(Activity Ratios)

レッスン(Lesson)9: 流動性比率(Liquidity Ratios)

レッスン(Lesson)10: 支払能力比率(Solvency Ratios)

レッスン(Lesson)11: 収益性比率(Profitability Ratios)

レッスン(Lesson)12: 統合財務比率分析(Integrated Financial Ratio Analysis)

レッスン(Lesson)13: デュポン分析(DuPont Analysis)—ROEの分解(The Decomposition of ROE)

レッスン(Lesson)14: 業界別財務比率(Industry-Specific Financial Ratios)

レッスン(Lesson)15: モデル構築(Model Building)と予測(Forecasting)

財務諸表モデリング(Financial Statement Modeling)入門

レッスン(Lesson)1: 財務諸表モデル(Financial Statement Model)の構築(Building a Financial Statement Model)

レッスン(Lesson)2: 行動ファイナンス(Behavioral Finance)とアナリスト予測(Analyst Forecasts)

レッスン(Lesson)3: 価格(Prices)とコスト(Costs)における競争要因(Competitive Factors)の影響(The Impact of Competitive Factors in Prices and Costs)

レッスン(Lesson)4: インフレ(Inflation)とデフレ(Deflation)のモデリング(Modeling Inflation and Deflation)

レッスン(Lesson)5: 予測期間(Forecast Horizon)と長期予測(Long-Term Forecasting)
